items.title: Habeas Corpus Act 1804
items.description: An Act for the more effectual Administration of Justice in England and Ireland by the issuing of Writs of Habeas Corpus ad testificandum, in certain Cases.

items.title: An Act to amend an Act, made in the Forty second Year of His present Majesty, to amend the Laws for the better Regulation of the Linen Manufacture in Ireland.
Clergy Ordination Act 1804
items.description: An Act to enforce the due Observance of the Canons and Rubrick respecting the Ages of Persons to be admitted into the sacred Orders of Deacon and Priest.
